phases.name: data-sources.js
phases.notes: All 7 real data sources created with 15s TTL caching

phases.name: dynamic-data.js
phases.notes: Rewrote with real data sources, no Math.random(), added getDashboard() and getPaperclipData()

phases.name: server.js integration

phases.name: frontend rendering

endpoints./api/org-chart: ✅ Real - Paperclip agents mapped to org structure
